description: Machine-readable state of every business rule and feature in GharSetu. Single source of truth for what is passing, in flight, blocked, or not started. Only gharsetu-lead writes state='passing', and only after the verification command exits 0 in a clean environment. See .claude/skills/harness-engineering/SKILL.md for the contract.
head: 6a537a4
scope_note: The 'current_engagement_features' bucket aligns with docs/product/Solution_Overview.docx v8 (2026-05-26 — final-close). The SAAS layer + Super Admin role + Admin Impersonation + Admin Task Delegation were all pulled forward into the current engagement on 2026-05-26 (previously deferred to v2). What remains under 'deferred' (in docs/planning/v2-saas-roadmap.md): subscription billing integration, custom domains + per-org branding only.

business_rules.behavior: No two active leases on the same unit simultaneously.
evidence: apps/api/prisma/migrations (partial unique index leases(unit_id) WHERE status='active')

business_rules.behavior: Rent locked at lease signing; cannot change mid-lease.
Rent editable only when unit is AVAILABLE or LISTED.
Occupied unit cannot move to in-maintenance until lease ended.
Records never deleted; retired = permanent soft-delete. DELETE endpoints return 405.
Listed unit rent change instantly updates the listing.
All co-tenants jointly liable for unpaid rent. Empty tenants[] on lease creation → 400 LEASE_NEEDS_TENANT.
One co-tenant cannot end lease alone; all must consent.
business_rules.verification: pnpm --filter @gharsetu/api test -t 'Finalize blocked until all co-tenants APPROVE'

business_rules.behavior: Termination stays pending until all consent or requester withdraws. No auto-timeout, no auto-approval.
business_rules.verification: pnpm --filter @gharsetu/api test -t 'Requester can withdraw termination request'

business_rules.behavior: Only PROPERTY_MANAGER and ADMIN record payments. TENANT or MAINTENANCE POST /payments → 403 BL_10_TENANT_CANNOT_RECORD_PAYMENT.
Concurrent co-tenant payment: first closes period, second auto-prepaid; overpayment routes excess to PrepaidCredit.
Period becomes overdue exactly 5 calendar days past due date.
Late fee = 2% × outstanding × full weeks overdue. Non-compounded — always on original outstanding.
Maintenance description ≥ 30 chars; resolution notes ≥ 20 chars.
Closed maintenance requests cannot be reopened. Invalid state transitions → 409 INVALID_TRANSITION.
Maintenance staff can read + update only; cannot create new requests.
≥5 maintenance requests for same unit in one calendar IST month → Admin alert. Counts current month only.
business_rules.verification: pnpm --filter @gharsetu/api test -t 'alert fires for current IST month only'

business_rules.behavior: Turnover gap (Fri-out → Mon-in): normal no-lease period. Not overdue, not double-bookable. Immediate re-lease → 409 TURNOVER_GAP_REQUIRED.
Each Property Manager assigned to exactly one property. Reassigning an already-assigned PM → 409 PM_ALREADY_ASSIGNED.
Previous PM keeps read-only access after property transfer.
Tenant (only the raiser) closes their own resolved maintenance requests. Tenant B (not raiser) → 403.
All times stored UTC; displayed in Asia/Kolkata (IST). Midnight renders as 00:00, never 24:00.
Dates rendered DD/MM/YYYY everywhere. en-IN locale, ₹ Indian digit grouping.

current_engagement_features.behavior: Per-room leasing: each room of a Room-based unit can carry its own active lease (independent rent, deposit, term, end date). A 4-BHK can hold up to 4 leases. BL-01 generalises to per-scope uniqueness.
RentSchedule history: scheduled rent changes with 60-day minimum notice, tenant email notification, banner in tenant UI. Notice window tunable in Settings.
Visitor Management: tenant pre-approves visitors; PM approves / denies and timestamps check-in / check-out. SMS / email notifications deferred to v1.1.
Master Data Administration: ADMIN can create / edit / deactivate Amenities, Maintenance Categories, Payment Methods, City, State via UI. Previously baked into code. (Gap closure — missing module.)
evidence: docs/product/Solution_Overview.docx §Gaps in Existing Modules → 7. Master Data Administration

current_engagement_features.behavior: Settings: ADMIN tunes 3 values — late-fee rate (default 2%), grace period (default 5 days), rent-change notice window (default 60 days). Writes audit-log entry on every change. (Gap closure — missing module.)

Organisation Management (SAAS layer): public organisation sign-up; Super Admin reviews + approves; on approval the organisation is provisioned and its first Admin auto-created. Subscription Plans catalogue (Basic / Standard / Premium) caps active users. Super Admin can view / deactivate / re-plan any organisation. Shared-schema multi-tenancy with organisation_id on every table + Postgres RLS.
current_engagement_features.verification: pnpm --filter @gharsetu/api test -t 'organisation.*sign-up.*super admin approval'; pnpm --filter @gharsetu/api test -t 'RLS.*cross-org'

current_engagement_features.behavior: Super Admin role (platform-level, above all organisations). Sole role that crosses organisation boundaries. Capabilities: approve organisation sign-up, manage Subscription Plans, view / deactivate / re-plan any organisation. Admin role remains scoped to its own organisation.

Admin Impersonation — login-as. Admin starts an impersonation session as any Property Manager, Maintenance Team member or Tenant within own Organisation; session is end-able at any time. Audit attribution: every action recorded against the Admin, not the impersonated user. Boundary: cannot impersonate Super Admin; cannot impersonate users outside own Organisation; cannot impersonate other Admins.
evidence: docs/product/Solution_Overview.docx §New Features → Users & Access — Admin Impersonation

current_engagement_features.behavior: Admin Task Delegation — Admin assigns any action they themselves are authorised to perform, to a Property Manager or Maintenance Team member, for a defined date range. Window-bounded rights: delegate has extra rights ONLY inside the window. Audit attribution: actions during the window recorded against the delegate (not the Admin) — asymmetric vs impersonation.
evidence: docs/product/Solution_Overview.docx §New Features → Users & Access — Task Delegation

carry_over_v1_post_release.behavior: NestJS 10 → 11 migration to clear @nestjs/core GHSA-36xv. N-1 policy currently in force; no exploitable path per VAPT.
carry_over_v1_post_release.blocker: Awaiting user decision on N-1 vs latest policy

carry_over_v1_post_release.behavior: Next.js Content-Security-Policy header via next.config.mjs headers() export.
Extract shared formatDateIST / locale helpers to @gharsetu/shared (currently duplicated between api and web).
Playwright spec isolation: either teach each spec to self-seed, or commit to --workers=1 in CI.
Password minimum length 10 → 12 (ASVS L2 recommendation). Deferred per user; SRS §10.2 deviation documented.
carry_over_v1_post_release.blocker: Deferred by user; reopen only on explicit request

saas_design_decisions_locked.behavior: Sequencing: SAAS layer pulled forward into the current engagement (was previously deferred to a separate v2). What remains deferred: impersonation, task delegation, subscription billing, custom domains.
saas_design_decisions_locked.supersedes: Original 2026-05-24 lock that put v2 SAAS after v3.1

saas_design_decisions_locked.behavior: SAAS-level entity named 'Organisation'. Existing TENANT role keeps that name. New column: organisation_id on every tenant-scoped table.
Data isolation: shared schema + organisation_id on every table + Postgres Row-Level Security. Super Admin sits above this boundary.
Billing / payment processing: forever out of scope. Plans + user-count enforcement are in scope; Razorpay/Stripe/PayPal are NOT — manual invoicing only.

deferred_post_engagement.behavior: Subscription billing integration. Subscription Plans cap active users today; payment collection stays manual.
Custom domains and per-organisation branding (logo, colours).

summary.release_status: v1 RELEASE-READY pending user sign-off (phase-8-closeout 2026-05-11). All MUST-FIX closed, 967/967 unit+integration tests green, 74/74 Playwright green (serial), 23/23 BLs locked.
